notes: Added/used structured playtest logging (wave/floor/run) and gathered Stage9A simulation data from playtest_logs.ndjson. Baseline campaign outcomes: TrapHeavy defeat (kills 4, scrap 38), Balanced defeat (kills 16, scrap 84), TechHeavy defeat (kills 2, scrap 23), all with floorsCleared=0 and floorsLost=2. Applied balance pass to runtime and ScriptableObject data: passive wave scrap +1 (4->5), reduced Grey/Stalker/TechUnit HP+speed, increased Shotgun cadence (1.2->1.0), increased Roomba throughput (damage 5->6, interval 0.8->0.7), and reduced wave counts across Ground/Upper/Attic while preserving progression pressure. Documented all changes/rationales in docs/balance_log.md. Final post-change verification playthroughs and full MCP test reruns were blocked by Unity MCP transport/HTTP bridge instability (server endpoint unavailable or failing to attach in-session).
